business.name: Ridge Roofing and Building LLC | Roofing Contractor | Roof Repair | EPDM and TPO | Asphalt Shingle | Miami FL

homepage.heroSubline: Protecting homes and businesses with expert roofing solutions. Ridge Roofing and Building: Quality you can trust, built to last.
aboutText: Ridge Roofing and Building LLC was founded over a decade ago right here in Miami. We saw a need for roofing contractors who understood the unique challenges our South Florida climate presents – from hurricane-force winds to relentless sun and salt air corrosion. We built this company on a foundation of integrity, quality workmanship, and a commitment to exceeding customer expectations.

Our approach is simple: deliver durable, reliable roofing solutions tailored to each client's specific needs and budget. We believe in clear communication, transparent pricing, and meticulous attention to detail. From initial inspection to final cleanup, we treat every project as if it were our own home.

We're proud to be a part of the Miami community. We actively support local initiatives and partner with organizations dedicated to strengthening our neighborhoods. We’re not just building roofs; we’re building relationships that last.

valueProps.title: Local Expertise
valueProps.description: Deep understanding of Miami's building codes, weather patterns, and architectural styles.

valueProps.title: Experienced Crew
valueProps.description: Our team of skilled roofers is highly trained and certified, delivering precise and efficient installations.

valueProps.title: Guaranteed Satisfaction
valueProps.description: We stand behind our work with comprehensive warranties and a commitment to your complete satisfaction.

homepage.ctaSubline: Protect your property with a durable, reliable roof. Contact us today for a no-obligation quote.

services.name: Asphalt Shingle Roofing
services.shortDescription: Durable and cost-effective asphalt shingle roofing solutions for Miami homes.
services.description:
Asphalt shingles remain a popular choice for Miami homeowners due to their affordability, versatility, and wide range of styles. At Ridge Roofing and Building, we offer expert asphalt shingle installation, repair, and replacement services. We understand the importance of selecting the right shingle type to withstand Miami's harsh climate, including intense sun, heavy rain, and hurricane-force winds.

We work with leading manufacturers to provide a variety of shingle options, from traditional 3-tab shingles to architectural and dimensional shingles that offer enhanced durability and aesthetic appeal. Our experienced team ensures proper installation techniques, including proper underlayment, flashing, and ventilation, to maximize the lifespan of your asphalt shingle roof. We also offer regular maintenance services to address any potential issues before they escalate into costly repairs.

Whether you're building a new home or replacing an existing roof, we can help you choose the perfect asphalt shingle roofing solution to protect your property and enhance its curb appeal. We'll provide a detailed estimate and guide you through every step of the process, ensuring a seamless and stress-free experience. Trust Ridge Roofing and Building for all your asphalt shingle roofing needs in Miami.
process: Step 1: Thorough roof inspection to assess existing conditions and identify any damage.
Step 2: Material selection and detailed estimate outlining all costs and timelines.
Step 3: Professional installation using industry-leading techniques and quality materials.
Step 4: Final inspection and cleanup to ensure complete satisfaction.
benefits: Wide range of styles and colors

faq.question: How long does an asphalt shingle roof last in Miami?
faq.answer: With proper installation and maintenance, an asphalt shingle roof can last 20-30 years in Miami. However, factors like sun exposure, wind, and rain can affect its lifespan.

faq.question: What type of asphalt shingle is best for hurricane-prone areas?
faq.answer: Architectural or dimensional shingles are generally more resistant to high winds than traditional 3-tab shingles. We recommend choosing shingles with a high wind rating for optimal protection.

faq.question: How often should I have my asphalt shingle roof inspected?
faq.answer: We recommend having your roof inspected at least once a year, especially after a major storm. Regular inspections can help identify and address potential problems early on.

services.name: EPDM & TPO Roofing
services.shortDescription: Durable and energy-efficient EPDM and TPO roofing solutions for commercial buildings.
services.description:
EPDM (ethylene propylene diene monomer) and TPO (thermoplastic polyolefin) are single-ply roofing membranes known for their durability, energy efficiency, and resistance to weathering. Ridge Roofing and Building specializes in EPDM and TPO roofing installation, repair, and maintenance for commercial buildings in Miami. These roofing systems are ideal for flat or low-sloped roofs, providing superior protection against leaks, UV damage, and extreme temperatures.

We offer a range of EPDM and TPO roofing options to meet the specific needs of your business. Our experienced team will assess your building's requirements and recommend the most suitable roofing system. We use only high-quality materials and employ expert installation techniques to ensure a long-lasting and reliable roof. We also provide regular maintenance services to extend the lifespan of your EPDM or TPO roof and prevent costly repairs.

Investing in an EPDM or TPO roof can significantly reduce your energy costs by reflecting sunlight and reducing heat absorption. These roofing systems are also environmentally friendly, as they are recyclable and contribute to a cooler urban environment. Trust Ridge Roofing and Building to provide expert EPDM and TPO roofing solutions that protect your investment and improve your bottom line.
process: Step 1: Detailed assessment of your building's roof and energy efficiency needs.
Step 2: Selection of the appropriate EPDM or TPO roofing system and material.
Step 3: Professional installation by our certified roofing technicians.
Step 4: Thorough inspection and quality assurance to ensure optimal performance.
benefits: Resistant to UV damage and weathering

faq.question: What is the lifespan of an EPDM or TPO roof?
faq.answer: With proper installation and maintenance, an EPDM or TPO roof can last 20-30 years or more.

faq.question: Are EPDM and TPO roofs resistant to ponding water?
faq.answer: Yes, EPDM and TPO roofs are designed to withstand ponding water, making them ideal for flat or low-sloped roofs.

faq.question: How can I maintain my EPDM or TPO roof?
faq.answer: Regular inspections, cleaning, and prompt repairs can help extend the lifespan of your EPDM or TPO roof. We offer comprehensive maintenance services to keep your roof in top condition.

services.name: Roof Repair Services
services.shortDescription: Fast and reliable roof repair services to fix leaks and protect your Miami property.
services.description:
From minor leaks to major storm damage, Ridge Roofing and Building provides comprehensive roof repair services for Miami homes and businesses. We understand that a damaged roof can lead to significant problems, including water damage, mold growth, and structural issues. That's why we offer prompt and reliable roof repair services to address any roofing issue quickly and effectively.

Our experienced team can diagnose and repair all types of roofing problems, including leaks, missing shingles, damaged flashing, and storm damage. We use high-quality materials and proven repair techniques to ensure long-lasting results. We also offer emergency roof repair services to address urgent roofing issues that require immediate attention.

Whether you have a small leak or extensive roof damage, we can help. We'll provide a thorough inspection, a detailed estimate, and expert repair services to restore the integrity of your roof and protect your property. Don't let a damaged roof compromise your home or business. Contact Ridge Roofing and Building for fast and reliable roof repair services in Miami.
process: Step 1: Emergency tarping to prevent further water damage.
Step 2: Detailed roof inspection to identify the source of the leak.
Step 3: Expert repair using matching materials and proven techniques.
Step 4: Final inspection to ensure the leak is resolved and the roof is secure.

faq.question: How quickly can you respond to a roof repair request?
faq.answer: We offer emergency roof repair services and strive to respond to all repair requests as quickly as possible. Our response time depends on the severity of the damage and our current workload.

faq.question: Do you offer temporary roof repairs?
faq.answer: Yes, we can provide temporary roof repairs, such as tarping, to prevent further water damage until a permanent repair can be made.

faq.question: How much does a roof repair cost?
faq.answer: The cost of a roof repair varies depending on the type and extent of the damage. We provide free estimates after a thorough inspection of your roof.

services.name: Roof Replacement Services
services.shortDescription: Upgrade your Miami home with a durable and beautiful new roof from Ridge Roofing.
services.description:
Is your roof showing signs of age, damage, or wear? Ridge Roofing and Building offers expert roof replacement services to protect your Miami home and enhance its curb appeal. We understand that replacing your roof is a significant investment, and we're committed to providing a seamless and stress-free experience.

Our experienced team will guide you through every step of the roof replacement process, from selecting the right roofing materials to ensuring a professional installation. We offer a wide range of roofing options, including asphalt shingles, tile, metal, and flat roofing systems, to suit your style and budget. We use only high-quality materials from trusted manufacturers to ensure a long-lasting and reliable roof.

We'll remove your old roof, inspect the underlying structure for any damage, and install your new roof with meticulous attention to detail. We also offer roof ventilation solutions to improve energy efficiency and prevent moisture buildup. With Ridge Roofing and Building, you can rest assured that your roof replacement project will be completed to the highest standards of quality and craftsmanship.
process: Step 1: Removal of the old roofing material.
Step 2: Inspection of the roof deck for any damage or rot.
Step 3: Installation of new underlayment and flashing.
Step 4: Installation of new roofing material and final inspection.

faq.question: How do I know if I need a roof replacement?
faq.answer: Signs that you may need a roof replacement include leaks, missing or damaged shingles, excessive granule loss, and a sagging roof deck.

faq.question: How long does a roof replacement take?
faq.answer: The duration of a roof replacement depends on the size and complexity of the roof, as well as the weather conditions. Most roof replacements can be completed in 1-3 days.

faq.question: What type of roofing material is best for Miami?
faq.answer: The best roofing material for Miami depends on your budget, style preferences, and the architectural design of your home. Asphalt shingles, tile, and metal are all popular choices in South Florida.

services.name: Commercial Roofing Services
services.shortDescription: Expert commercial roofing solutions for businesses in Miami, including installation, repair, and maintenance.
services.description:
Ridge Roofing and Building provides comprehensive commercial roofing services for businesses throughout Miami. We understand the unique challenges of commercial roofing, including the need for durable, energy-efficient, and cost-effective solutions. Our experienced team can handle all types of commercial roofing projects, from new construction to roof replacements and repairs.

We offer a wide range of commercial roofing options, including EPDM, TPO, modified bitumen, and metal roofing systems. We'll work with you to select the best roofing system for your building's specific needs and budget. Our team is highly trained and certified in the installation and maintenance of all types of commercial roofing systems.

We also offer preventative maintenance programs to extend the lifespan of your commercial roof and prevent costly repairs. Our maintenance services include regular inspections, cleaning, and minor repairs to address any potential issues before they escalate. With Ridge Roofing and Building, you can rest assured that your commercial roof is in good hands.
process: Step 1: Detailed roof inspection and assessment.
Step 2: Customized roofing solution tailored to your business needs.
Step 3: Professional installation by our certified roofing team.
Step 4: Ongoing maintenance and support.

faq.question: What types of commercial roofing systems do you install?
faq.answer: We install a wide range of commercial roofing systems, including EPDM, TPO, modified bitumen, and metal roofing.

faq.question: Do you offer preventative maintenance programs for commercial roofs?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer customized preventative maintenance programs to extend the lifespan of your commercial roof and prevent costly repairs.

faq.question: How can I get a quote for a commercial roofing project?
faq.answer: Contact us today to schedule a free consultation and receive a detailed quote for your commercial roofing project.

services.name: Roof Inspections
services.shortDescription: Thorough roof inspections to identify potential problems and protect your Miami property.
services.description:
Protect your investment with Ridge Roofing and Building's comprehensive roof inspection services. Regular roof inspections are essential for identifying potential problems early on, preventing costly repairs, and extending the lifespan of your roof. Our experienced team will conduct a thorough inspection of your roof, looking for signs of damage, wear, and leaks.

We'll inspect all aspects of your roof, including the shingles, flashing, gutters, and ventilation system. We'll provide you with a detailed report outlining our findings and recommendations for any necessary repairs or maintenance. Our roof inspection services are ideal for homeowners, business owners, and real estate professionals.

Whether you're buying or selling a property, or simply want to ensure the integrity of your roof, Ridge Roofing and Building can help. Contact us today to schedule a roof inspection and protect your investment.
process: Step 1: Schedule a convenient inspection appointment.
Step 2: Thorough visual inspection of your roof.
Step 3: Detailed report outlining findings and recommendations.
Step 4: Expert advice on necessary repairs or maintenance.

faq.question: How often should I have my roof inspected?
faq.answer: We recommend having your roof inspected at least once a year, and after any major storms.

faq.question: What is included in a roof inspection report?
faq.answer: Our roof inspection reports include a detailed description of any damage or wear, as well as recommendations for necessary repairs or maintenance.

faq.question: How much does a roof inspection cost?
faq.answer: The cost of a roof inspection depends on the size and complexity of the roof. Contact us today for a free quote.

reviews.name: Maria G.
reviews.text: Ridge Roofing did an amazing job repairing a leak in my asphalt shingle roof after the last hurricane. They were fast, professional, and the price was very reasonable. I highly recommend them!

reviews.name: David S.
reviews.text: We recently had Ridge Roofing install an EPDM roof on our commercial building, and we couldn't be happier. The crew was efficient, the quality of work was outstanding, and the roof looks great. They handled the permitting process seamlessly.

reviews.name: Jessica L.
reviews.text: I hired Ridge Roofing for a roof inspection before buying a home in Coral Gables. They were very thorough and identified some potential issues that I was able to address with the seller. Worth every penny!

reviews.name: Robert K.
reviews.text: Ridge Roofing replaced my old, damaged asphalt shingle roof with a beautiful new one. The entire process was smooth and stress-free. The crew was professional and cleaned up everything perfectly. My house looks fantastic!

reviews.name: Ashley M.
reviews.text: I had a major leak in my roof during a storm, and Ridge Roofing came to my rescue. They provided emergency tarping and then quickly repaired the damage. I was so impressed with their responsiveness and professionalism.

reviews.name: Michael B.
reviews.text: We had some minor damage to our TPO roof, and Ridge Roofing was able to fix it quickly and efficiently. They were knowledgeable and provided a fair price. We will definitely use them again for any future roofing needs.
